Africa–Global Gap
Africa carries a disproportionate AMR burden. With resistance rates nearly double the global average and among the world's highest antibiotic use per capita (DID) in some countries, targeted stewardship and investment are critical to closing this gap.
Africa Isolates in Dataset
7,500
Significant surveillance gap — Africa underrepresented vs burden of disease
